en.name: Crosswordle
en.desc: Swap letters to form valid words
en.description: Crosswordle combines word puzzle creativity with strategic letter swapping! You're presented with a grid where each row should spell a valid word, but the letters are scrambled. Swap letters between columns to unscramble each row. With limited swaps and a ticking clock, this game tests both your vocabulary and spatial thinking. Can you unscramble all the words?
en.objectives: Swap letters between columns to make every row spell a valid word. Complete the puzzle using as few swaps as possible, or before time runs out. Challenge yourself to recognize word patterns quickly!
en.howToPlay: Click on a letter, then click another letter in a different column to swap them. Each row must form a valid word. Use hints wisely as swaps are limited.

rules.controls: Click on a letter to select it, then click another letter in a different column to swap their positions. Swaps can only occur between different columns, not within the same column.
mechanics: Each row must form a valid dictionary word
Swaps only work between different columns
Timer adds pressure in timed mode
features: Word Validation - Only real words accepted
Hint System - Get help when stuck

tips: Look for common letter patterns first
Check which letters could start or end words
Use the word list as a reference for valid words
Plan multiple swaps ahead before executing

faq.question: Can I swap letters in the same column?
faq.answer: No, swaps can only occur between different columns. This constraint is what makes the puzzle challenging—you must think about how each swap affects multiple rows.

faq.question: What happens if I run out of swaps?
faq.answer: In limited swap mode, you'll need to restart. Try to plan your moves more carefully—look for swaps that fix multiple rows at once.

faq.question: How do I know if a word is valid?
faq.answer: The game validates against a dictionary. If a row turns green, all words are valid. Invalid arrangements won't be accepted.

faq.question: What's the best strategy?
faq.answer: Start by identifying likely word patterns—common prefixes (TH, CH, WH) and suffixes (ING, TION, LY). Then focus on the most constrained rows first.

zh.name: 填字游戏
zh.desc: 交换字母组成有效单词
zh.description: 填字游戏结合了文字谜题创意和战略性字母交换！你看到一个网格，每行应该拼出一个有效单词，但字母被打乱了。在列之间交换字母来解开每行。有限的交换和滴答作响的时钟，这个游戏同时测试你的词汇量和空间思维。你能解开所有单词吗？
zh.objectives: 在列之间交换字母使每行拼出有效单词。用尽可能少的交换完成谜题，或在时间耗尽前完成。挑战自己快速识别单词模式！
zh.howToPlay: 点击一个字母，然后点击另一列中的另一个字母来交换它们。每行必须形成一个有效的单词。明智地使用提示，因为交换次数有限。

rules.controls: 点击字母选中它，然后点击另一列中的另一个字母交换它们的位置。交换只能在不同的列之间进行，不能在同一列内。
mechanics: 每行必须形成有效的字典单词
交换只能在不同列之间进行
计时器在计时模式下增加压力
提示揭示正确的字母位置
features: 单词验证 - 只接受真实单词
交换计数器 - 追踪你的效率
提示系统 - 卡住时获取帮助
多种难度 - 各种单词长度

tips: 首先寻找常见的字母模式
检查哪些字母可以开头或结尾单词
使用单词列表作为有效单词的参考
在执行之前提前规划多次交换

faq.question: 可以在同一列内交换字母吗？
faq.answer: 不可以，交换只能在不同列之间进行。这个约束是谜题的挑战所在——你必须思考每次交换如何影响多行。

faq.question: 如果交换用完了怎么办？
faq.answer: 在有限交换模式下，你需要重新开始。尝试更仔细地规划你的移动——寻找能同时修复多行的交换。

faq.question: 如何知道单词是否有效？
faq.answer: 游戏根据字典验证。如果一行变绿，所有单词都是有效的。无效排列不会被接受。

faq.question: 最佳策略是什么？
faq.answer: 从识别可能的单词模式开始——常见前缀（TH、CH、WH）和后缀（ING、TION、LY）。然后首先关注最受约束的行。
